title: just raw debris
description: adds raw ancient debris to the game
body:
this mod adds:
raw debris (which you can fortune to get more of ancient debris)
raw debris block (an storage block for raw debris)
netherite scrap block (netherite scrap storage block and can be used for the base of the beacon)

u can still get the normal ancient debris block by silk touch


fabric (and quilt by some extend) versions will be coming if it gets enough downloads but it might only happen if 1.19 releases of the program i use
